title: Implement state value Codec dispatch system for 7 value types (int/long/double/float/boolean/string/uuid)

reference_files.reason: Value types table - int/long/double/float/boolean/string/uuid with use cases
Zero value semantics for unregistered/type mismatch - int=0, double=0.0, boolean=false, string='', uuid=null

acceptance_criteria: StateValueCodecs class provides Codec<Object> with dispatch based on StateValueType for all 7 types
Each value type has a typed Codec: INT (Codec.INT), LONG (Codec.LONG), DOUBLE (Codec.DOUBLE), FLOAT (Codec.FLOAT), BOOLEAN (Codec.BOOL), STRING (Codec.STRING), UUID (CodecUtil.UUID or custom)
StateValueCodecs.encode(StateValueType type, Object value) serializes value to Tag/JsonElement
StateValueCodecs.decode(StateValueType type, Tag/JsonElement) deserializes to typed Object
StateValueCodecs.zeroValue(StateValueType type) returns correct zero value: INT=0, LONG=0L, DOUBLE=0.0, FLOAT=0.0f, BOOLEAN=false, STRING="", UUID=null
StateValueCodecs.isTypeMatch(StateValueType type, Object value) validates runtime type matches declared type
Codec dispatch handles Map<ResourceLocation, Object> serialization for state maps (mixed value types per key)
